file_any_single.description: Upload a single file of any type into the agent's session VFS. State exposes metadata only ({name, size, type, vfs_path}); the bytes live in VFS under vfs_target and can be read by the agent from there.

content.title: Upload any file
content.prompt: Drop a file here or click to pick one.

file_image_multi.description: Upload one or more images (png/jpg/webp/gif). MIME-filtered via accept; bytes land in VFS under uploads/images/.

content.title: Upload images
content.prompt: Drop images here or click to pick. Multiple allowed.

file_pdf_only.description: Upload a single PDF (e.g. for ingestion / Q&A). Uses a wildcard-style accept string rather than a list.

content.title: Upload PDF
content.prompt: Drop a PDF here or click to pick one.
content.submit_query: User uploaded a PDF for ingestion.
